full_text:
Guo Jian (Shuzhi) 郭建 (叔始)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Jian (郭建), styledShuzhi (叔始). A talented man. Died of illness. Guo Jian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
